children.label: A
children.text: that does not procure or specify a firm quantity of property (other than a minimum or maximum quantity); and

children.label: B
children.text: that provides for the issuance of orders for the delivery of property during the period of the contract.

children.label: A
children.text: that does not procure or specify a firm quantity of services (other than a minimum or maximum quantity); and

children.label: B
children.text: that provides for the issuance of orders for the performance of tasks during the period of the contract.
